page_metadata.biotools__summary: Real-Time eXperiment Interface (RTXI) is a software development project aimed at producing a real-time Linux based software system for hard real-time data acquisition and control applications in biological research.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Real-Time eXperiment Interface (RTXI) is a software development project aimed at producing a real-time Linux based software system for hard real-time data acquisition and control applications in biological research.
